title: Layers of the Earth (Crust, Mantle, Core)

flashcards.definition: Outermost solid layer; continental (thick, granitic) and oceanic (thin, basaltic).
Thick silicate layer between crust and core; contains the partially molten asthenosphere.
Solid iron-nickel sphere at Earth's center; solid despite extreme heat due to enormous pressure.
Rigid outer shell (crust + upper mantle) broken into tectonic plates.
Partially molten zone in the upper mantle that allows tectonic plates to move.
